title: Junior Instructional Designer at Navneet Education Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Navneet Education Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navneet Education Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Navneet Education Ventures Solutions:
Navneet Education Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education Ventures Solutions!
